title: Rollback Plan Registry Model
description: Rollback Plan Registry cataloging all defined rollback plans and their readiness states.

fields.name: target_component
fields.purpose: Component or service targeted by the rollback plan

fields.name: plan_version
fields.purpose: Semantic version of the rollback plan definition

fields.name: checklist_refs
fields.purpose: References to associated rollback readiness checklist items

safety_notes: Schema readiness only. No runtime execution.
